title: Asqav Shadow AI Capture - managed storage schema
description: MDM-readable configuration keys for the Asqav Shadow AI Capture extension. Set via Chrome enterprise policy (see https://support.google.com/chrome/a/answer/9867568) to auto-enable detection and seed credentials on managed devices.

mdmAutoEnable.title: Auto-enable detection
mdmAutoEnable.description: When true, the extension auto-grants the AI host permissions and enables detection on cold start without user interaction.

mdmApiKey.title: Asqav API key
mdmApiKey.description: Asqav signer API key. Written to chrome.storage.session on cold start so it is not persisted to disk.

mdmApiEndpoint.title: Asqav signer base URL
mdmApiEndpoint.description: Optional override of the default signer base URL (https://api.asqav.com/api/v1/agents). Use for private Asqav instances.

mdmManagedHosts.title: Managed host patterns
mdmManagedHosts.description: Optional list of host patterns to request at startup. Defaults to the bundled AI host seed list when absent.
